docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, CORDELL AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, WILLIAM ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SPARKY'S DINER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
